/usr/bin/cc  -fsanitize=address -fsanitize-recover=address -g "CMakeFiles/CWE401_Memory_Leak__int64_t_calloc_32-bad.dir/s01/CWE401_Memory_Leak__int64_t_calloc_32.c.o" -o /home/loris/Desktop/TestRepositories/Forked/juliet-test-suite-c/Automatic/results/20260706_1238/CWE401/asan/bin/CWE401/bad/CWE401_Memory_Leak__int64_t_calloc_32-bad  /home/loris/Desktop/TestRepositories/Forked/juliet-test-suite-c/Automatic/results/20260706_1238/CWE401/asan/bin/support/libsupport.a -lpthread -lm
